name: Cinematic Poly
explanation: A lush, grand polyphonic synthesizer for cinematic brass-leaning pads and swells. Up to eight voices keyed by note, each running two detuned layers of saw + pulse oscillators into their own resonant low-pass with a filter ADSR, then an amplitude ADSR; a gentle global ensemble chorus and brightness tilt add the wide, choral sheen. Controls: Detune, Cutoff, Resonance, Filter Env Amount, Attack, Release, Brightness and Level.
